metadata.description: CrowdStrike Next-Gen SIEM Correlation Rules for ATT&CK Coverage Gaps
metadata.author: TachTech Labs

rules.name: T1007 - System Service Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of system services using native tools
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=ProcessRollup2 OR event_type=SyntheticProcessRollup2) AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'sc query' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Service' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic service' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'net start')

rules.name: T1010 - Application Window Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of open application windows
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Process' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'MainWindowTitle' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'tasklist.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '/v')

rules.name: T1012 - Query Registry
rules.description: Detects suspicious registry queries for system information
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'reg.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'query') OR (CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ItemProperty' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'HKLM') OR (CommandLine CONTAINS 'REG QUERY'))

rules.name: T1016 - System Network Configuration Discovery
rules.description: Detects network configuration enumeration
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'ipconfig.exe' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'netsh.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-NetIPConfiguration' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-NetAdapter' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'route.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'print')

rules.name: T1018 - Remote System Discovery
rules.description: Detects discovery of remote systems on the network
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'net.exe' AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'view' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'group') OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'nltest.exe' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'dsquery.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ADComputer' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'arp.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '-a')

rules.name: T1033 - System Owner/User Discovery
rules.description: Detects discovery of system owner or current user
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'whoami.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'echo %username%' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '$env:USERNAME' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'query user' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'quser.exe')

rules.name: T1046 - Network Service Discovery
rules.description: Detects network service scanning and port enumeration
rules.query: (event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'nmap' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'masscan' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Test-NetConnection' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'tnc ' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'portqry')) OR (event_type=NetworkConnect AND ConnectionCount > 50 AND RemotePort IN (21,22,23,25,80,443,445,3389,5985))

rules.name: T1049 - System Network Connections Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of active network connections
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'netstat.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-NetTCPConnection' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-NetUDPEndpoint' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'ss.exe')

rules.name: T1057 - Process Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of running processes
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'tasklist.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Process' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic process' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'ps aux' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'ps -ef')

rules.name: T1069 - Permission Groups Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of local or domain permission groups
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'net.exe' AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'localgroup' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'group /domain') OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-LocalGroup' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ADGroup' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'gpresult.exe')

rules.name: T1082 - System Information Discovery
rules.description: Detects collection of detailed system information
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'systeminfo.exe' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'hostname.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ComputerInfo' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic os get' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic computersystem' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'ver')

rules.name: T1083 - File and Directory Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of files and directories
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND ((ImageFileName CONTAINS 'dir' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'tree.exe') AND (CommandLine CONTAINS '/s' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '/r') OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ChildItem -Recurse' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'gci -r' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'ls -la')

rules.name: T1120 - Peripheral Device Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of peripheral devices
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic path win32_pnpentity' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-PnpDevice' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'devcon.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'pnputil')

rules.name: T1124 - System Time Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of system time for evasion or scheduling
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'w32tm.exe' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'time.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Date' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'net time')

rules.name: T1135 - Network Share Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of network shares
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'net.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'share' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-SmbShare' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-WmiObject Win32_Share' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'shareenum')

rules.name: T1201 - Password Policy Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of password policies
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'net.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'accounts' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ADDefaultDomainPasswordPolicy' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'secedit /export')

rules.name: T1217 - Browser Information Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of browser bookmarks and history
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=ProcessRollup2 OR event_type=FileRead) AND (FilePath CONTAINS 'Bookmarks' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'History' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'places.sqlite' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'Login Data' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'Cookies')

rules.name: T1482 - Domain Trust Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of domain trust relationships
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'nltest.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'trusted_domains' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ADTrust' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'dsquery.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'trust' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'netdom trust')

rules.name: T1518 - Software Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of installed software
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic product get' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-WmiObject Win32_Product' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Package' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'reg query' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'Uninstall')

rules.name: T1526 - Cloud Service Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of cloud services and resources
rules.query: (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'az account' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'aws sts' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'gcloud' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-AzResource')) OR (event_type=CloudApiActivity AND Operation CONTAINS 'List' OR Operation CONTAINS 'Describe')

rules.name: T1538 - Cloud Service Dashboard
rules.description: Detects access to cloud service dashboards for reconnaissance
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (UserAgent CONTAINS 'console' OR Operation CONTAINS 'Console' OR Operation CONTAINS 'Dashboard') AND SourceIpAddress NOT IN (known_corporate_ips)

rules.name: T1580 - Cloud Infrastructure Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of cloud infrastructure components
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'DescribeInstances' OR Operation CONTAINS 'ListBuckets' OR Operation CONTAINS 'DescribeVpcs' OR Operation CONTAINS 'az vm list' OR Operation CONTAINS 'compute.instances.list')

rules.name: T1613 - Container and Resource Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of containers and orchestration resources
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'docker ps' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'docker images' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'kubectl get' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'crictl' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'podman ps')

rules.name: T1614 - System Location Discovery
rules.description: Detects discovery of system geographic location or language
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-WinSystemLocale' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Culture' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'chcp' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'systeminfo' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'locale')

rules.name: T1615 - Group Policy Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of group policy settings
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'gpresult.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-GPO' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-GPResultantSetOfPolicy' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'secedit.exe')

rules.name: T1619 - Cloud Storage Object Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of cloud storage objects
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'ListObjects' OR Operation CONTAINS 's3:ListBucket' OR Operation CONTAINS 'storage.objects.list' OR Operation CONTAINS 'ListBlobs')

rules.name: T1652 - Device Driver Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of device drivers
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'driverquery' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-WindowsDriver' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic sysdriver' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'pnputil /enum-drivers')

rules.name: T1654 - Log Enumeration
rules.description: Detects enumeration of security and system logs
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'wevtutil' AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'qe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'query-events') OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-WinEvent' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-EventLog')

rules.name: T1673 - Virtual Machine Discovery
rules.description: Detects discovery of virtual machine environments
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'systeminfo' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic bios' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'dmidecode' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'vboxmanage' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'vmrun')

rules.name: T1680 - Local Storage Discovery
rules.description: Detects enumeration of local storage devices and volumes
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'wmic diskdrive' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Volume' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-PhysicalDisk' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'fsutil' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'diskpart')

rules.name: T1197 - BITS Jobs
rules.description: Detects abuse of BITS for persistence or transfer
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'bitsadmin.exe' AND (CommandLine CONTAINS '/transfer' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '/create' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '/addfile' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '/SetNotifyCmdLine') OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Start-BitsTransfer')

rules.name: T1480 - Execution Guardrails
rules.description: Detects malware checking environment before execution
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'hostname' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'whoami') AND ParentProcessId IN (SELECT ProcessId FROM suspicious_processes)

rules.name: T1535 - Unused/Unsupported Cloud Regions
rules.description: Detects resource creation in unusual cloud regions
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'Create' OR Operation CONTAINS 'Run') AND Region NOT IN (approved_regions_list)

rules.name: T1542 - Pre-OS Boot
rules.description: Detects modification of boot processes or firmware
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'bcdedit.exe' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'bootrec.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'firmware') OR event_type=FirmwareUpdate)

rules.name: T1578 - Modify Cloud Compute Infrastructure
rules.description: Detects modification of cloud compute resources
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'CreateSnapshot' OR Operation CONTAINS 'CreateImage' OR Operation CONTAINS 'ModifyInstance' OR Operation CONTAINS 'StopInstances' OR Operation CONTAINS 'TerminateInstances')

rules.name: T1599 - Network Boundary Bridging
rules.description: Detects network boundary bypass attempts
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND (DestinationPort IN (1080,8080,3128) OR Protocol='SOCKS') AND SourceZone='internal' AND DestinationZone='external'

rules.name: T1600 - Weaken Encryption
rules.description: Detects attempts to weaken encryption settings
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=RegistryOperationDetectInfo AND (RegistryPath CONTAINS 'Cryptography' OR RegistryPath CONTAINS 'SSL' OR RegistryPath CONTAINS 'TLS') AND RegistryValueName CONTAINS 'Enabled'

rules.name: T1601 - Modify System Image
rules.description: Detects modification of system images or firmware
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'dd if=' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'flashrom' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'fwupdmgr' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'firmware')

rules.name: T1610 - Deploy Container
rules.description: Detects deployment of potentially malicious containers
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'docker run' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'kubectl run' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'podman run') AND (CommandLine CONTAINS '--privileged' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'hostPID' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'hostNetwork')

rules.name: T1612 - Build Image on Host
rules.description: Detects building container images on compromised hosts
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'docker build' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'podman build' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'buildah')

rules.name: T1647 - Plist File Modification
rules.description: Detects modification of macOS plist files for evasion
rules.query: event_platform=Mac AND (event_type=FileWritten OR event_type=ProcessRollup2) AND (FilePath CONTAINS '.plist' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'defaults write' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'plutil')

rules.name: T1656 - Impersonation
rules.description: Detects social engineering impersonation attempts
rules.query: event_type=EmailReceived AND (SenderDisplayName CONTAINS 'IT Support' OR SenderDisplayName CONTAINS 'Help Desk' OR SenderDisplayName CONTAINS 'CEO' OR SenderDisplayName CONTAINS 'CFO') AND SenderDomain NOT IN (internal_domains)

rules.name: T1666 - Modify Cloud Resource Hierarchy
rules.description: Detects modification of cloud organizational structure
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'MoveAccount' OR Operation CONTAINS 'UpdateOrganization' OR Operation CONTAINS 'organizations.folders' OR Operation CONTAINS 'resourcemanager')

rules.name: T1672 - Email Spoofing
rules.description: Detects spoofed email headers
rules.query: event_type=EmailReceived AND (SPFResult='fail' OR DKIMResult='fail' OR DMARCResult='fail') AND SenderDomain IN (internal_domains)

rules.name: T1678 - Delay Execution
rules.description: Detects use of sleep or delay commands for evasion
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'Start-Sleep' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'timeout /t' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'ping -n' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '127.0.0.1' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'sleep')

rules.name: T1679 - Selective Exclusion
rules.description: Detects attempts to exclude files from security scanning
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'Add-MpPreference' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'ExclusionPath' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Set-MpPreference' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'Exclusion')

rules.name: T1106 - Native API
rules.description: Detects direct use of Windows Native API for execution
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'NtCreateProcess' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'RtlCreateUserThread' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'ZwCreateThread' OR CallStackContains='ntdll.dll')

rules.name: T1129 - Shared Modules
rules.description: Detects execution via shared modules or DLLs
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ModuleLoad AND (ModulePath NOT CONTAINS 'System32' AND ModulePath NOT CONTAINS 'SysWOW64' AND ModulePath NOT CONTAINS 'Program Files') AND LoadedByProcess NOT IN (trusted_processes)

rules.name: T1203 - Exploitation for Client Execution
rules.description: Detects client-side exploitation leading to code execution
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND ParentImageFileName IN ('WINWORD.EXE','EXCEL.EXE','POWERPNT.EXE','OUTLOOK.EXE','AcroRd32.exe','chrome.exe','firefox.exe','msedge.exe') AND ImageFileName IN ('cmd.exe','powershell.exe','wscript.exe','cscript.exe','mshta.exe','regsvr32.exe')

rules.name: T1204 - User Execution
rules.description: Detects malicious execution initiated by user action
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ParentImageFileName CONTAINS 'explorer.exe' OR ParentImageFileName CONTAINS 'outlook.exe') AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS '.exe' AND FilePath CONTAINS 'Downloads' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'Temp' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'AppData')

rules.name: T1559 - Inter-Process Communication
rules.description: Detects execution via COM or DDE
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'DDE' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'CreateObject' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'GetObject' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '-ComObject')

rules.name: T1569 - System Services
rules.description: Detects execution via system services
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'sc.exe' AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'create' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'start') OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'net.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'start' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'New-Service')

rules.name: T1609 - Container Administration Command
rules.description: Detects malicious container administration commands
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'docker exec' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'kubectl exec' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'crictl exec') AND (CommandLine CONTAINS '/bin/sh' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '/bin/bash' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'cmd.exe')

rules.name: T1648 - Serverless Execution
rules.description: Detects malicious serverless function execution
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'InvokeFunction' OR Operation CONTAINS 'lambda:Invoke' OR Operation CONTAINS 'functions.call') AND SourceIpAddress NOT IN (known_automation_ips)

rules.name: T1651 - Cloud Administration Command
rules.description: Detects execution via cloud administration interfaces
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'RunCommand' OR Operation CONTAINS 'ssm:SendCommand' OR Operation CONTAINS 'compute.instances.setMetadata') AND SourceIpAddress NOT IN (known_admin_ips)

rules.name: T1674 - Input Injection
rules.description: Detects input injection for code execution
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'SendKeys' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'keybd_event' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'mouse_event' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'AutoHotkey' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'AutoIt')

rules.name: T1675 - ESXi Administration Command
rules.description: Detects malicious ESXi administration commands
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'esxcli' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'vim-cmd' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'vmware-cmd') AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'kill' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'power off' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'unregister')

rules.name: T1677 - Poisoned Pipeline Execution
rules.description: Detects malicious CI/CD pipeline execution
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND ParentImageFileName IN ('jenkins.exe','gitlab-runner','github-actions','azure-pipelines') AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'curl' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'wget' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Invoke-WebRequest')

rules.name: T1005 - Data from Local System
rules.description: Detects collection of sensitive local data
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=FileRead AND (FilePath CONTAINS 'Documents' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'Desktop' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.ssh' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.aws' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'wallet.dat') AND ProcessName NOT IN (trusted_processes)

rules.name: T1025 - Data from Removable Media
rules.description: Detects collection of data from removable media
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=FileRead AND (FilePath MATCHES '^[D-Z]:' AND FilePath NOT CONTAINS 'Program Files') AND DriveType='Removable'

rules.name: T1039 - Data from Network Shared Drive
rules.description: Detects collection of data from network shares
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=FileRead AND (FilePath CONTAINS '\\\\' OR FilePath MATCHES '^\\\\') AND FileExtension IN ('docx','xlsx','pdf','pptx','txt','csv') AND ReadCount > 10

rules.name: T1074 - Data Staged
rules.description: Detects staging of collected data for exfiltration
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=FileWritten AND (FilePath CONTAINS 'Temp' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'AppData\\Local') AND FileExtension IN ('zip','7z','rar','tar','gz') AND FileSize > 10000000

rules.name: T1114 - Email Collection
rules.description: Detects collection of email data
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=FileRead AND (FilePath CONTAINS '.pst' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.ost' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.eml' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.msg')) OR (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'New-MailboxExportRequest')

rules.name: T1115 - Clipboard Data
rules.description: Detects collection of clipboard contents
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-Clipboard' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'clip.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'GetClipboardData' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'pbpaste')

rules.name: T1119 - Automated Collection
rules.description: Detects automated data collection scripts
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'for /r' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'copy' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Get-ChildItem -Recurse' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'Copy-Item' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'find' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '-exec')

rules.name: T1123 - Audio Capture
rules.description: Detects audio recording activity
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'SoundRecorder' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'ffmpeg' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'audio' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'sox')) OR (event_type=DeviceAccess AND DeviceType='Microphone')

rules.name: T1125 - Video Capture
rules.description: Detects video recording activity
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'ffmpeg' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'video' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'OBS' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'webcam')) OR (event_type=DeviceAccess AND DeviceType='Camera')

rules.name: T1185 - Browser Session Hijacking
rules.description: Detects browser session hijacking attempts
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=FileRead AND (FilePath CONTAINS 'Cookies' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'Session' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'Login Data') AND ProcessName NOT IN ('chrome.exe','firefox.exe','msedge.exe')

rules.name: T1213 - Data from Information Repositories
rules.description: Detects collection from information repositories
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'confluence' OR Operation CONTAINS 'sharepoint' OR Operation CONTAINS 'github' OR Operation CONTAINS 'gitlab') AND (Operation CONTAINS 'download' OR Operation CONTAINS 'export' OR Operation CONTAINS 'clone')

rules.name: T1530 - Data from Cloud Storage
rules.description: Detects collection of data from cloud storage
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'GetObject' OR Operation CONTAINS 's3:GetObject' OR Operation CONTAINS 'storage.objects.get' OR Operation CONTAINS 'DownloadBlob') AND BytesTransferred > 100000000

rules.name: T1602 - Data from Configuration Repository
rules.description: Detects collection of network device configurations
rules.query: event_type=NetworkDeviceActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'show running-config' OR Operation CONTAINS 'show startup-config' OR Protocol='SNMP' AND SNMPOperation='GET')

rules.name: T1485 - Data Destruction
rules.description: Detects data destruction activities
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'format' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '/y' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'cipher /w' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'sdelete' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'shred' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'rm -rf')

rules.name: T1491 - Defacement
rules.description: Detects website or system defacement
rules.query: (event_type=FileWritten AND FilePath CONTAINS 'wwwroot' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'htdocs' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'html' AND FileExtension IN ('html','htm','php','asp','aspx','jsp')) OR (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'echo' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '>' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'index')

rules.name: T1495 - Firmware Corruption
rules.description: Detects firmware corruption attempts
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'flashrom' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'fwupd' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'bcdedit' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'firmware' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'dd' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '/dev/')

rules.name: T1498 - Network Denial of Service
rules.description: Detects network DoS attacks
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND (ConnectionCount > 1000 AND TimeWindow < 60 OR Protocol IN ('UDP','ICMP') AND PacketCount > 10000)

rules.name: T1499 - Endpoint Denial of Service
rules.description: Detects endpoint DoS attacks
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'fork bomb' OR CommandLine CONTAINS ':(){ :|:& };:' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '%0|%0' OR ProcessCount > 1000)

rules.name: T1529 - System Shutdown/Reboot
rules.description: Detects unexpected system shutdown or reboot
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'shutdown.exe' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'restart.exe' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Restart-Computer' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Stop-Computer') AND UserName NOT IN (admin_users)

rules.name: T1531 - Account Access Removal
rules.description: Detects removal of user account access
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (ImageFileName CONTAINS 'net.exe' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'user' AND (CommandLine CONTAINS '/delete' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '/active:no') OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Remove-LocalUser' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Remove-ADUser')

rules.name: T1561 - Disk Wipe
rules.description: Detects disk wiping activities
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'format' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '/q' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'diskpart' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'clean' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'dd' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'of=' OR ImageFileName CONTAINS 'sdelete')

rules.name: T1565 - Data Manipulation
rules.description: Detects manipulation of stored or transmitted data
rules.query: event_type=FileWritten AND FilePath CONTAINS 'database' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.db' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.sql' AND ProcessName NOT IN (trusted_database_processes)

rules.name: T1657 - Financial Theft
rules.description: Detects financial theft activities
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'wallet' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'bitcoin' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'crypto' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'bank') AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'transfer' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'send' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'export')

rules.name: T1667 - Email Bombing
rules.description: Detects email bombing attacks
rules.query: event_type=EmailReceived AND RecipientAddress=single_recipient AND EmailCount > 100 AND TimeWindow < 3600

rules.name: T1589 - Gather Victim Identity Information
rules.description: Detects gathering of victim identity information
rules.query: event_type=DnsRequest AND QueryName CONTAINS (target_domain) AND QueryType IN ('MX','TXT','SOA') AND SourceIpAddress NOT IN (internal_ips)

rules.name: T1590 - Gather Victim Network Information
rules.description: Detects gathering of victim network information
rules.query: event_type=DnsRequest AND (QueryName CONTAINS 'version.bind' OR QueryType='ANY' OR QueryType='AXFR') AND SourceIpAddress NOT IN (internal_dns_servers)

rules.name: T1591 - Gather Victim Org Information
rules.description: Detects gathering of victim organization information
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND (URL CONTAINS 'linkedin.com/company' OR URL CONTAINS 'glassdoor.com' OR URL CONTAINS 'crunchbase.com') AND SourceIpAddress IN (monitored_ips)

rules.name: T1592 - Gather Victim Host Information
rules.description: Detects gathering of victim host information
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND (UserAgent CONTAINS 'scanner' OR UserAgent CONTAINS 'nikto' OR UserAgent CONTAINS 'nmap' OR URL CONTAINS 'robots.txt')

rules.name: T1593 - Search Open Websites/Domains
rules.description: Detects searches for target information on public sites
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND (URL CONTAINS 'github.com' OR URL CONTAINS 'pastebin.com' OR URL CONTAINS 'shodan.io') AND QueryString CONTAINS (target_domain)

rules.name: T1594 - Search Victim-Owned Websites
rules.description: Detects reconnaissance of victim-owned websites
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND DestinationDomain IN (owned_domains) AND (URL CONTAINS 'admin' OR URL CONTAINS 'login' OR URL CONTAINS 'config' OR URL CONTAINS '.git')

rules.name: T1596 - Search Open Technical Databases
rules.description: Detects searches in technical databases for target info
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND (URL CONTAINS 'shodan.io' OR URL CONTAINS 'censys.io' OR URL CONTAINS 'zoomeye.org' OR URL CONTAINS 'crt.sh')

rules.name: T1597 - Search Closed Sources
rules.description: Detects access to closed/paid threat intelligence sources
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND (URL CONTAINS 'recorded future' OR URL CONTAINS 'flashpoint' OR URL CONTAINS 'intel471') AND UserAccount NOT IN (authorized_threat_intel_users)

rules.name: T1598 - Phishing for Information
rules.description: Detects phishing attempts to gather information
rules.query: event_type=EmailReceived AND (Subject CONTAINS 'verify' OR Subject CONTAINS 'confirm' OR Subject CONTAINS 'update' OR Subject CONTAINS 'expire') AND SenderDomain NOT IN (trusted_domains) AND ContainsLink=true

rules.name: T1681 - Search Threat Vendor Data
rules.description: Detects searches in threat vendor data for target info
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND (URL CONTAINS 'virustotal.com' OR URL CONTAINS 'hybrid-analysis.com' OR URL CONTAINS 'any.run') AND QueryString CONTAINS (internal_file_hashes OR internal_domains)

rules.name: T1583 - Acquire Infrastructure
rules.description: Detects acquisition of attacker infrastructure
rules.query: event_type=DnsRequest AND QueryName IN (newly_registered_domains) AND RegistrationAge < 30

rules.name: T1584 - Compromise Infrastructure
rules.description: Detects use of compromised infrastructure
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND DestinationIpAddress IN (known_compromised_ips) OR DestinationDomain IN (known_compromised_domains)

rules.name: T1585 - Establish Accounts
rules.description: Detects creation of attacker accounts
rules.query: event_type=AccountCreated AND (EmailDomain IN (disposable_email_domains) OR AccountAge < 7)

rules.name: T1586 - Compromise Accounts
rules.description: Detects use of compromised accounts
rules.query: event_type=AuthenticationSuccess AND SourceIpAddress NOT IN (user_typical_locations) AND (SourceCountry != user_typical_country OR ImpossibleTravel=true)

rules.name: T1587 - Develop Capabilities
rules.description: Detects development of attacker capabilities
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'msfvenom' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Covenant' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Empire' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Cobalt')

rules.name: T1608 - Stage Capabilities
rules.description: Detects staging of attacker capabilities
rules.query: event_type=FileWritten AND (FilePath CONTAINS 'wwwroot' OR FilePath CONTAINS 'public_html') AND FileExtension IN ('exe','dll','ps1','bat','sh','py')

rules.name: T1650 - Acquire Access
rules.description: Detects acquisition of access through brokers
rules.query: event_type=AuthenticationSuccess AND SourceIpAddress IN (known_access_broker_ips) OR UserAccount IN (recently_sold_accounts)

rules.name: T1011 - Exfiltration Over Other Network Medium
rules.description: Detects exfiltration over alternative network mediums
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND Protocol IN ('Bluetooth','WiFi-Direct','Infrared') AND DataTransferred > 1000000

rules.name: T1020 - Automated Exfiltration
rules.description: Detects automated data exfiltration
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND DestinationPort IN (443,80,8080) AND BytesSent > 50000000 AND ConnectionDuration < 300 AND IsScheduledTask=true

rules.name: T1029 - Scheduled Transfer
rules.description: Detects scheduled data transfers for exfiltration
rules.query: event_type=ScheduledTaskCreated AND (TaskAction CONTAINS 'curl' OR TaskAction CONTAINS 'wget' OR TaskAction CONTAINS 'ftp' OR TaskAction CONTAINS 'scp') AND TaskAction CONTAINS 'upload' OR TaskAction CONTAINS 'put'

rules.name: T1030 - Data Transfer Size Limits
rules.description: Detects chunked data exfiltration to avoid detection
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND DestinationIpAddress=same_ip AND ConnectionCount > 20 AND BytesSentPerConnection < 1000000 AND TotalBytesSent > 50000000

rules.name: T1041 - Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
rules.description: Detects exfiltration over command and control channel
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND DestinationIpAddress IN (known_c2_ips) AND BytesSent > BytesReceived * 10 AND BytesSent > 10000000

rules.name: T1052 - Exfiltration Over Physical Medium
rules.description: Detects exfiltration via physical media
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=RemovableMediaInserted AND (event_type=FileWritten AND FilePath CONTAINS removable_drive AND FileSize > 10000000)

rules.name: T1537 - Transfer Data to Cloud Account
rules.description: Detects data transfer to cloud storage accounts
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'PutObject' OR Operation CONTAINS 'UploadBlob' OR Operation CONTAINS 'storage.objects.create') AND DestinationBucket NOT IN (approved_buckets) AND BytesTransferred > 50000000

rules.name: T1525 - Implant Internal Image
rules.description: Detects implanting malicious code in container images
rules.query: event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'docker commit' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'docker push') AND ImageName NOT IN (approved_images)

rules.name: T1653 - Power Settings
rules.description: Detects modification of power settings for persistence
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'powercfg' AND (CommandLine CONTAINS '/change' OR CommandLine CONTAINS '/setactive') OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Set-PowerPlan')

rules.name: T1668 - Exclusive Control
rules.description: Detects establishing exclusive control over resources
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'takeown' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'icacls' AND CommandLine CONTAINS '/deny' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'chmod 000')

rules.name: T1671 - Cloud Application Integration
rules.description: Detects malicious cloud application integrations
rules.query: event_type=CloudApiActivity AND (Operation CONTAINS 'CreateApplication' OR Operation CONTAINS 'UpdateApplication' OR Operation CONTAINS 'AddPermission') AND RequestedPermissions CONTAINS 'admin' OR RequestedPermissions CONTAINS 'full_access'

rules.name: T1200 - Hardware Additions
rules.description: Detects unauthorized hardware device connections
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=DeviceConnected AND (DeviceType='USB' OR DeviceType='Network') AND DeviceId NOT IN (approved_devices)

rules.name: T1659 - Content Injection
rules.description: Detects content injection for initial access
rules.query: event_type=WebRequest AND (RequestBody CONTAINS '<script' OR RequestBody CONTAINS 'javascript:' OR RequestBody CONTAINS 'onerror=' OR RequestBody CONTAINS 'onload=')

rules.name: T1669 - Wi-Fi Networks
rules.description: Detects rogue WiFi access for initial access
rules.query: event_type=WifiConnection AND (SSID IN (evil_twin_ssids) OR BSSID NOT IN (approved_access_points) OR SecurityType='Open')

rules.name: T1212 - Exploitation for Credential Access
rules.description: Detects exploitation to obtain credentials
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'mimikatz' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'sekurlsa' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'lsadump' OR ProcessName='lsass.exe' AND ParentProcessName NOT IN ('wininit.exe','services.exe'))

rules.name: T1649 - Steal or Forge Authentication Certificates
rules.description: Detects theft or forgery of authentication certificates
rules.query: event_platform=Win AND (event_type=ProcessRollup2 AND (CommandLine CONTAINS 'certutil' AND CommandLine CONTAINS 'exportPFX' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'Export-PfxCertificate' OR CommandLine CONTAINS 'certipy') OR event_type=FileRead AND FilePath CONTAINS '.pfx' OR FilePath CONTAINS '.p12')

rules.name: T1665 - Hide Infrastructure
rules.description: Detects attempts to hide C2 infrastructure
rules.query: event_type=NetworkConnect AND (DestinationIpAddress IN (tor_exit_nodes) OR DestinationIpAddress IN (vpn_endpoints) OR DestinationDomain MATCHES '\.onion$')
